zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Valence於大約1273年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特時，她的父親William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke48歲，母親Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke44歲。她於1298年與John Comyn Lord of Badenoch在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1324年之前在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Valence于大约1273年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫特时，她的父亲William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke48岁，母亲Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke44岁。她于1298年与John Comyn Lord of Badenoch在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1324年之前在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼，埋葬在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Vallance
meanings: English and Scottish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Valence in Drôme, France, named with Latin valentia ‘strength, capacity’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Valence was born about 1273, in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, her father, William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke, was 48 and her mother, Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke, was 44. She married John Comyn Lord of Badenoch in 1298, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died before 1324, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, and was buried in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Valence est née environ 1273, à Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé John Comyn Lord of Badenoch en 1298, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1324, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Valence um 1273 in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke 48 und ihre Mutter Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke 44. Sie hat 1298 in Cornwall, England John Comyn Lord of Badenoch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1324 in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Valence è nata il circa 1273 nel Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, sua padre, William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato John Comyn Lord of Badenoch nel 1298, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 1324, nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Valenceが約1273年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエントで生まれた時，父William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembrokeは48歳，母Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembrokeは44歳であった。1298年にイギリスコルンワルでJohn Comyn Lord of Badenochと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1324年以前にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで死去し，イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Valence(이)가 대략 1273년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1298년 영국 코른월에서 John Comyn Lord of Badenoch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1324년 이전 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Valence nasceu aproximadamente 1273, em Charente, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com John Comyn Lord of Badenoch em 1298, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1324, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Valence родилась около 1273 г. в местности чарент, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, её отцу по имени William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Comyn Lord of Badenoch в 1298 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 1324 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Valence nació aproximadamente 1273, en Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke, tenía 44 años. Se casó con John Comyn Lord of Badenoch en 1298, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 1324, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
